name: claude-superflow
description: Brainstorm → plan → execute development workflow for Claude Code, designed around bounded subagents and strict context control so long autonomous runs survive across sessions. Configurable autonomy, worktree management, legacy plan import, doctor lint, Codex routing, self-paced loops.

required.name: superpowers
required.reason: /superflow delegates to superpowers:brainstorming, writing-plans, subagent-driven-development, executing-plans, using-git-worktrees, systematic-debugging, finishing-a-development-branch

optional.name: codex
optional.reason: Required only if codex_routing is set to auto or manual; provides codex:codex-rescue subagent

optional.name: context7-mcp
optional.reason: Used by the CD-4 ladder for library documentation lookups during blocker resolution
